title: Godiva
content:
Lingerie,
        black pumps
        a navel creamy enough
        to drown a kitten - 
        the clothes assemble
        in microwave fashion
         - crackle of fire - 
        the silver pants zoom across legs
        with curves so caress bound
        a formula racing driver
        might tumble.

        As eyes rise
        in jade lantern face
        & hair is brushed
        with all sheen aside,
        the lady is more than
        a Godiva
        or Goldwyn-Mayer cinematic production,
        this oasis of sparks,
        twin peaks of McKinley-Matterhorn fame,
        her calendar of words
        pulling Oil of Olay
        & perfumed honey thru
        each studied remark.
meaning:
Paul Cameron Brown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Godiva"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
